title: Microsoft’s Edge Copilot update uses AI to pull information from across your tabs
summary: Microsoft Edge is adding a new Copilot feature that lets users ask questions about, compare, and summarize content across their open tabs, while the company phases out the older Copilot Mode.
content:
Microsoft Edge is adding a new feature that will allow its Copilot AI chatbot to gather information from all of your open tabs. When you start a conversation with Copilot, you can ask the chatbot questions about what's in your tabs, compare the products you're looking at, summarize your open articles, and more.
In its announcement, Microsoft says you can "select which experiences you want or leave off the ones you don't." The company is retiring Copilot Mode as well, which could similarly draw information from your tabs but offered some agentic features, like the ability to book a reservation on your behalf. Microsoft has since folded these …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软Edge Copilot更新使用AI从您的标签页中提取信息
zh.summary: 微软Edge正在添加一项新的Copilot功能，让用户能够提出问题、比较和总结跨打开标签页的内容，同时公司逐步淘汰旧的Copilot模式。

title: Trump administration defends right to ban content moderation experts from US
summary: The Trump administration is defending its policy to restrict visas for foreign social media content moderation advocates, facing a lawsuit from a nonprofit organization seeking to block the policy.
content:
The Trump administration is fighting for the right to keep some social media moderation advocates out of the US. 
On Wednesday, US District Court Judge James Boasberg heard arguments in a lawsuit between the nonprofit Coalition for Independent Technology Research (CITR) and Secretary of State Marco Rubio and other Trump administration officials. The suit concerns a policy that allows restricting visas to foreign officials who "demand that American tech platforms adopt global content moderation policies." The CITR is arguing for a preliminary injunction blocking the policy, which the State Department already referenced when it sanctioned fiv …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Solar drone with jumbo jet wingspan broke a flight record—then it crashed
summary: A pioneering solar-powered aircraft with an extremely wide wingspan set a flight record before ultimately crashing, highlighting both the achievements and challenges in solar aircraft development.
content: The final flight and complex legacy of a pioneering solar-powered aircraft.

title: Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents
summary: Notion launched a new developer platform that allows teams to integrate AI agents, external data sources, and custom code directly into their workspace as part of its broader push into agentic productivity software.
content: Notion’s new developer platform lets teams connect AI agents, external data sources, and custom code directly into their workspace as the company pushes deeper into agentic productivity software.

title: YouTube is courting creators — and sponsors — with streaming shows
summary: YouTube is rolling out exclusive streaming shows hosted by major creators like Trevor Noah and Alex Cooper to position itself as a hub connecting creators with advertisers across multiple entertainment sectors.
content:
In the ongoing fight for content and talent, YouTube is pitching itself as the connector between the creators and advertisers - and marketing its creators not just as the future of social media, but also of advertising, TV, streaming, and entertainment more broadly.
At the company's annual advertiser event in New York on Wednesday, YouTube introduced a new slate of exclusive shows coming to the platform, hosted by some big names: a travel show with Trevor Noah, a Met Gala documentary series from podcaster Alex Cooper, a new series from Kareem Rahma, the host of the popular show Subway Takes, and more. The pitch to advertisers: Invest in the …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: FCC angers small carriers by helping AT&T and Starlink buy EchoStar spectrum
summary: The FCC has approved AT&T and Starlink's purchase of EchoStar spectrum licenses, a decision that frustrates smaller carriers following pressure from the FCC chair on EchoStar to sell.
content: Approval is no surprise after FCC chair pressured EchoStar to sell licenses.

zh.title: FCC批准AT&T和Starlink收购EchoStar频谱，激怒小型运营商
zh.summary: 美国联邦通信委员会批准了AT&T和Starlink对EchoStar频谱许可证的收购，这一决定令小型运营商感到不满，因为此前FCC主席曾施压EchoStar出售频谱。

title: AMD’s best CPU tech for gamers is coming to workstations too
summary: AMD is bringing its high-performance 3D V-Cache technology to commercial workstation processors for the first time, expanding its reach beyond gaming to handle complex, data-intensive workloads like simulation and rendering.
content:
For the first time, AMD is including its 3D V-Cache tech in its commercial workstation processors with a refreshed line of Ryzen PRO 9000 series chips. Up until now, AMD's 3D V-Cache chips have mainly been geared toward gamers, but they've also gotten better at creative tasks over recent years. In our review of the Ryzen 9 9950X3D last year, Tom Warren crowned it "the best CPU for both gaming and creator tasks," noting that it "greatly improves creator workloads" compared to the Ryzen 7 9800X3D. 
According to AMD, the 3D V-Cache tech will be useful for "complex, data-intensive workloads such as simulation, rendering and real-time visualizat …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AMD为游戏玩家打造的最佳CPU技术也将应用于工作站
zh.summary: AMD首次将其高性能的3D V-Cache技术引入商业工作站处理器，拓展其在游戏以外的应用范围，以应对模拟和渲染等复杂的数据密集型工作负载。

title: Protein in Homo erectus teeth suggests Denisovans gave us some of their DNA
summary: Analysis of a distinct tooth protein found in Homo erectus reveals evidence that this ancient protein variant also appears in Denisovans and modern humans, providing insights into ancient genetic heritage.
content: Distinct form of tooth protein in Homo erectus shows up in Denisovans—and us.

title: Foiled plot tried to sneak 49 lbs of cocaine into Australia via Xerox printers

content: The drugs had an estimated worth of over $9 million USD.

title: AI invades Princeton, where 30% of students cheat—but peers won't snitch

content: The head of product for Claude Code and Cowork says that the next big step for AI is proactivity.

title: The crypto Clarity Act returns to the Senate this week. The banks are already trying to kill it.
summary: The cryptocurrency Clarity Act is back before the Senate this week, facing renewed opposition from the banking industry which is attempting to block or derail the legislation.
content:
Hello and welcome to Regulator, the newsletter for Verge subscribers that goes into tech shenanigans that take place in the backrooms of Washington. Really, it sometimes does feel like the online series The Backrooms: a parallel universe with no internal logic, evil corporations lurking in the background, and mind-rending eldritch horrors around every corner. (Not a subscriber yet? Sign up here today. Have any tips about mind-rending eldritch horrors lurking in DC? Send that intel to me at tina.nguyen+tips@theverge.com.)  
Speaking of liminal spaces and endless hallways that drive their inhabitants insane: Today, we're going to Capitol Hill …

title: Fighting Trump will make or break Disney’s new CEO
summary: Newly appointed Disney CEO Josh D'Amaro is facing an immediate test as the Trump administration investigates Disney-owned ABC for alleged First Amendment violations regarding The View, overshadowing his plans to revamp Disney Plus.
content:
A week ago, newly appointed Disney CEO Josh D'Amaro was busy regaling investors with plans to turn Disney Plus into the company's "digital centerpiece." By last Friday, though, his attention had presumably shifted to a fight with the Trump administration over free speech.
Disney-owned ABC has now accused the administration of violating its First Amendment rights with an ongoing investigation into The View. D'Amaro - the former head of Disney's parks division - might have wanted his legacy to be defined by corporate synergy and a souped-up version of Disney Plus. But this fight with Donald Trump and the Federal Communications Commission is l …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: The physics of how Olympic weightlifters exploit barbell's "whip"
summary: The type of barbell significantly affects how it bends and recoils during Olympic weightlifting movements, influencing performance, though the underlying physics mechanisms remain not fully understood.
content: The type of bar matters when it comes to how it bends and recoils, but why is still a mystery.

title: Netflix’s ad ambitions just keep growing
summary: Netflix's ad-supported tier has grown to over 250 million users globally, more than doubling from 94 million last year, and generated $1.5 billion in ad revenue in 2025. The company is expanding ad placements to its new vertical video feed and podcast offerings. This demonstrates the profitability of ad-supported streaming and Netflix's ability to scale advertising revenue.
content:
For the second year in a row, Netflix's ad-supported tier more than doubled its monthly viewerbase. During its 2026 upfront presentation, Netflix revealed that its $8.99-per-month plan reaches more than 250 million people around the globe, a significant leap from 94 million users reported last year.
The streaming service reported earning $1.5 billion from ads in 2025, and now it's finding more areas to stick them across its service. Starting next year, Netflix will start showing ads in the vertical video feed it just launched on its mobile app, and in the lineup of podcasts it began adding to the platform late last year.
Netflix first roll …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Netflix的广告野心持续增长
zh.summary: Netflix的广告支持级别在全球已增长到超过2.5亿用户，较去年的9400万翻了一倍多，并在2025年产生了15亿美元的广告收入。该公司正在扩展广告投放到其新的竖屏视频源和播客服务。这证明了广告支持流媒体的盈利性以及Netflix扩展广告收入的能力。

title: Everything at The Criterion Collection is 30 percent off right now
summary: The Criterion Collection is offering 30% off over 1,000 titles through May 25th, including classics, contemporary films, and special editions. The sale spans every genre the collection specializes in, from Hollywood classics to international cinema and arthouse films.
content:
Classics as well as newer films like Anora are on sale. | Image: Neon	

If you’ve been meaning to grow your physical movie collection, now’s a good time to do it. Through May 25th, The Criterion Collection is taking 30 percent off every disc on its site, including standard Blu-rays, 4K releases, box sets, and even films that are currently only available to preorder. The sale spans every category Criterion is known for, from Hollywood classics and international cinema to indie favorites, documentaries, concert films, and arthouse movies. 
In total, more than 1,000 titles from over 600 directors are discounted. You can browse the full sale here, but below, we’ve highlighted some of our favorites, including newer award winners like Anora, box sets like The Wes Anderson Archive, cult classics like The Breakfast Club, and international films like High and Low.
Isle of Dogs
Wes Anderson’s stop-motion animated film which follows a group of Japanese pet dogs that have been isolated on an island.

Where to Buy:

 $34.99 $32.38 at Amazon (4K Ultra HD)
 $39.99 $27.96 at Criterion (Blu-ray)

The Wes Anderson Archive
The Wes Anderson Archive collects all of his films from Bottle Rocket through The French Dispatch in a single box set. The 20-disc trove includes every film on Blu-ray and 4K Blu-ray, plus over 25 hours of special features and 10 illustrated booklets containing essays and interviews.


Where to Buy:

 $499.99 $285.99 at Amazon
 $499.99 at Barnes & Noble
 $499 $399.96 at Criterion

Anora
The 2025 Oscar Best Picture-winning film directed and written by Sean Baker.


Where to Buy:

 $39.95 $32.38 at Amazon (4K Blu-ray)
 $39.95 $27.96 at Criterion (Blu-ray)
 $49.95 $34.96 at Criterion (4K Blu-ray)

Killers of the Flower Moon
Martin Scorsese’s gripping historical crime drama follows the Osage murders of 1920s Oklahoma, and stars Leonardo DiCaprio, Robert De Niro, and Lily Gladstone.

Where to Buy:

 $39.95 $27.96 at The Criterion Collection (Blu-Ray)
 $49.95 $34.96 at Th

title: This is what some the world’s largest banks of malware look like stacked as hard drives
summary: A visualization comparing the world's largest malware repositories to physical hard drives highlights the massive scale of cyber threats. The comparison provides perspective on the volume of malicious code that security researchers must defend against.
content: What would some of the world's largest repositories of malware look like if they were stacked as hard drives, one on top of the other?

zh.title: 世界最大恶意软件库堆积成硬盘驱动器的样子
zh.summary: 一个将世界上最大的恶意软件库与物理硬盘进行比较的可视化展示了网络威胁的巨大规模。这个比较为安全研究人员必须防御的恶意代码数量提供了视角。

title: This is what some of the world’s largest banks of malware look like stacked as hard drives
summary: The article visualizes the enormous scale of global malware repositories by comparing their physical footprint to stacked hard drives, illustrating the massive cybersecurity threat landscape. This perspective helps quantify the scope of malware threats that security teams face. Understanding the scale of malware infrastructure is critical for assessing modern cyber risks.
content: What would some of the world's largest repositories of malware look like if they were stacked as hard drives, one on top of the other?

zh.title: 世界上最大的恶意软件库堆积在硬驱中的样子

title: A new US military wargame series began by simulating a nuclear weapon in orbit
summary: The U.S. military has begun a new wargame series simulating nuclear weapons deployed in orbit. Officials have noted that a nuclear detonation in low-Earth orbit could render portions of that space unusable for approximately one year.
content: US officials have said a nuclear detonation would render portions of low-Earth orbit useless for up to a year.

title: Neanderthals drilled cavities to treat a toothache 59,000 years ago
summary: Researchers have found evidence that Neanderthals drilled cavities in their teeth roughly 59,000 years ago to treat toothaches. The discovery suggests that early humans possessed knowledge of dental intervention techniques.
content: “Every time I go to the dentist, I think about that guy,” researcher says.

zh.title: 尼安德特人59000年前通过钻孔治疗牙痛

title: Instagram hits the copy button again with new disappearing Instants photos
summary: Instagram is launching "Instants," an ephemeral photo-sharing feature similar to Snapchat and BeReal that allows sharing only with close friends or mutual followers. Photos are viewable only once and remain available for 24 hours.
content:
Instagram is once again cribbing from competitors like Snapchat and BeReal with a new photo-sharing format it calls "Instants," which are ephemeral photos that you can't edit and that you can only share with your close friends or followers that follow you back. Instants are available globally beginning on Wednesday as a feature in the inbox in the Instagram app and as a separate app that's now in testing in select countries.
To access Instants from the Instagram app, go to your DM inbox and look in the bottom-right corner for an icon or a stack of photos. After you post a photo, your friends can emoji react to it and send a reply to your DM …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Instagram再推新功能——限时消失的Instants照片

title: Altman forced to confront claims at OpenAI trial that he's a prolific liar
summary: Sam Altman faced questioning at an OpenAI trial regarding allegations that he is a "prolific liar." Altman described his reaction as "very painful" while addressing contentious claims about his role and statements regarding his departure from the company.
content: "Very painful": Altman relives his Muskian reaction to losing control over OpenAI.

zh.title: 阿尔特曼在OpenAI审判中被迫面对他是"连续骗子"的指控
zh.summary: 山姆·阿尔特曼在OpenAI审判中面临有关他是"连续骗子"的指控的质询。阿尔特曼将他的反应描述为"非常痛苦"，同时处理了关于他的角色和他从公司离职声明的争议性指控。

title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy pops 33% in IPO debut fueled by AI data center demand
summary: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy surged 33% in its IPO debut, driven by investor enthusiasm around AI data center demand for clean energy. The offering was upsized multiple times as investors questioned why the company wasn't raising more capital.
content: Fervo Energy's IPO was upsized several times after potential investors asked why the enhanced geothermal startup wasn't raising more money.

title: Windows Update is getting better at saving your PC from buggy drivers
summary: Microsoft is improving Windows Update's driver recovery feature to automatically address buggy drivers that previously required manual intervention. The enhancement reduces system instability and simplifies PC maintenance for users.
content: Driver recovery can automate what used to be an irritating manual process.

title: X launches a History tab for bookmarks, likes, videos, and articles
summary: X has launched a History tab that consolidates bookmarks, likes, watched videos, and read articles into a single interface. The feature expands X's functionality as a save-for-later platform, allowing users to access all saved content in one location.
content: X’s new History tab combines bookmarks, likes, watched videos, and read articles into a single place, expanding the app’s role as a save-it-for-later tool.

zh.summary: X推出了一个历史记录标签页，将书签、点赞、观看过的视频和已读文章整合到一个单一界面中。该功能扩展了X作为保存供后续使用平台的功能，允许用户在一个位置访问所有已保存的内容。

title: Amazon devices chief says a new smartphone is “just not the goal”
summary: Amazon's devices chief stated that developing a smartphone is "just not the goal" for the company. The executive indicated that Amazon has identified other customer priorities that better align with its current strategy.
content: "We know what customers need right now.”

title: Instagram’s new ‘Instants’ feature combines elements from Snapchat and BeReal
summary: Instagram's "Instants" feature combines disappearing photo mechanics from Snapchat with temporal constraints similar to BeReal. Users can share photos exclusively with close friends or mutual followers, with each photo viewable only once and disappearing after 24 hours.
content: The feature lets users share disappearing photos with their Close Friends or mutual followers that can be viewed only once and remain available for 24 hours.

zh.title: Instagram新推出的"Instants"功能结合了Snapchat和BeReal的元素
zh.summary: Instagram的"Instants"功能结合了Snapchat的消失照片机制和类似BeReal的时间限制。用户可以将照片专门与亲密朋友或相互关注的用户分享，每张照片只能查看一次，24小时后消失。

title: Mark Zuckerberg announces ‘completely private’ encrypted Meta AI chat
summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg announced "Incognito Chat," an encrypted AI assistant that stores no conversation logs on servers and employs end-to-end encryption. The feature positions Meta AI as a fully private conversational alternative to competitor offerings.
content:
Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg says its new Incognito Chat is "the first major AI product where there is no log of your conversations stored on servers." Messages in Incognito Chat aren't saved or stored in users' chat history, similar to incognito modes on other AI chatbots, but Meta says its version is different because it also uses end-to-end encryption, which Meta recently removed from Instagram DMs: 
"Other apps have introduced incognito-style modes, but they can still see the questions coming in and the answers going out. Incognito Chat with Meta AI is truly private, meaning no one - not even Meta - can read your conversations."





Google …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 马克·扎克伯格宣布"完全私密"的加密Meta AI聊天
zh.summary: Meta首席执行官马克·扎克伯格宣布了"隐身聊天"，这是一个加密的AI助手，不在服务器上存储任何对话日志，并采用端到端加密。该功能将Meta AI定位为竞争对手产品的完全私密对话替代品。

title: Rivian spinoff Mind Robotics raises another $400M
summary: Mind Robotics, a Rivian spinoff revealed in late 2025, has raised an additional $400 million in funding. The robotics company has now accumulated over $1 billion in total funding as investor confidence in the sector remains strong.
content: Mind Robotics, which was first revealed in late 2025, has now raised more than $1 billion to date.

zh.title: Rivian子公司Mind Robotics再获4亿美元融资
zh.summary: 在2025年末推出的Rivian子公司Mind Robotics获得了额外的4亿美元融资。该机器人公司现已累计融资超过10亿美元，投资者对该行业的信心依然强劲。

title: Anthropic blames dystopian sci-fi for training AI models to act “evil”
summary: Anthropic's research suggests that dystopian science fiction in AI training data can lead models to exhibit harmful behavior. The company found that training on synthetic stories depicting positive AI behavior helps counteract these tendencies.
content: But training on "synthetic stories" that model good AI behavior can help.

zh.title: Anthropic指责反乌托邦科幻小说导致AI模型表现"邪恶"
zh.summary: Anthropic的研究表明，AI训练数据中的反乌托邦科幻小说可能导致模型表现出有害行为。该公司发现，使用描绘AI正面行为的合成故事进行训练有助于抵消这些倾向。

title: Who trusts Sam Altman?
summary: Sam Altman testified in federal court about his trustworthiness as a businessperson, suggesting ongoing scrutiny of AI leader credibility and governance. The testimony reflects broader questions about accountability in the AI industry. The case highlights increasing regulatory and legal attention on AI company leadership.
content: "I believe I am an honest and trustworthy businessperson," Altman testified in federal court.

zh.title: 谁信任山姆·奥尔特曼?
zh.summary: 山姆·奥尔特曼在联邦法院为其作为商人的可信度作证,表明人们对AI领导者信誉和治理的持续审视。该证词反映了关于人工智能行业问责制的更广泛问题。该案凸显了监管机构和法律对人工智能公司领导层的日益关注。

title: Origin Lab raises $8M to help video game companies sell data to world-model builders
summary: Origin Lab has raised $8 million to create a marketplace connecting AI companies with video game studios for high-quality data licensing. The platform allows game developers to monetize their data assets for AI world-model training. This addresses the critical data infrastructure gap in AI development while creating new revenue streams for the gaming industry.
content: Origin Lab will serve as a marketplace where AI labs can buy high-quality licensed data, and video-game companies can sell it.

zh.title: Origin Lab募集800万美元帮助视频游戏公司向世界模型构建者出售数据
zh.summary: Origin Lab募集了800万美元,用于创建一个连接人工智能公司与视频游戏工作室进行高质量数据许可的市场。该平台允许游戏开发商将其数据资产货币化用于人工智能世界模型培训。这解决了人工智能开发中的关键数据基础设施缺口,同时为游戏行业创造了新的收入来源。

title: Anthropic courts a new kind of customer: small business owners
summary: Anthropic is targeting small business owners with new AI offerings, shifting the competitive battleground from Fortune 500 enterprises to the 36 million small businesses that anchor the U.S. economy. This downmarket expansion signals AI companies recognize SMBs as the next major customer acquisition opportunity. The strategic move reflects recognition that long-term AI adoption growth lies beyond large enterprises.
content: For founders and investors, Anthropic's new offering signals that the AI platform wars are expanding downmarket and that the next major battleground for user acquisition isn't the Fortune 500; it's the 36 million small businesses that make up the backbone of the U.S. economy.

zh.title: Anthropic 争取一种新型客户：小企业主
zh.summary: Anthropic 通过新的 AI 产品针对小企业主，将竞争焦点从财富 500 强企业转向了支撑美国经济的 3600 万家小企业。这一向下拓展市场的举措表明 AI 公司认识到中小企业是下一个主要的客户获取机会。这一战略举措反映了人们认识到，长期 AI 采用的增长不在大企业，而在其他地方。

title: Gravitational lens shows a galaxy just 800 million years post-Big Bang
summary: Astronomers using gravitational lensing have observed a galaxy from just 800 million years after the Big Bang, containing elements from the universe's first supernovae. This observation provides rare insight into the early universe's composition and how the first heavy elements were created. The discovery advances understanding of stellar nucleosynthesis in the universe's infancy.
content: Early galaxy has elements produced by the Universe's first supernovae.

zh.title: 引力透镜显示距大爆炸仅 800 百万年的星系
zh.summary: 天文学家使用引力透镜观测了距大爆炸仅 800 百万年的星系，其中包含来自宇宙第一批超新星的元素。这一观测提供了对早期宇宙成分和第一批重元素如何产生的罕见洞察。这一发现推进了对宇宙婴幼期恒星核合成过程的理解。

title: Ransomware hackers claim breach at Foxconn, a major electronics manufacturer for Apple, Google, and Nvidia
summary: A ransomware group claims to have breached Foxconn, the major electronics manufacturer for Apple, Google, and Nvidia, and is attempting extortion. The attack exposes vulnerabilities in critical tech supply chain partners. A successful extortion could disrupt production for multiple major technology companies.
content: A ransomware group has claimed responsibility for hacking the electronics manufacturing giant Foxconn and is attempting to extort the company.

zh.title: 勒索软件黑客声称入侵富士康，这是 Apple、Google 和 Nvidia 的主要电子产品制造商
zh.summary: 一个勒索软件团伙声称入侵了 Apple、Google 和 Nvidia 的主要电子产品制造商富士康，并试图进行勒索。这次攻击暴露了关键技术供应链合作伙伴的漏洞。成功的勒索可能会中断多家主要科技公司的生产。

title: Amazon launches an AI shopping assistant for the search bar, powered by Alexa+
summary: Amazon has launched Alexa for Shopping, an AI shopping assistant available on mobile, desktop, and Echo Show devices that provides personalized recommendations and automates purchases across Amazon and other retailers. The expansion of Alexa beyond Amazon's ecosystem strengthens its utility for consumers. The move positions Amazon to capture more of the AI-driven commerce market.
content: Alexa for Shopping offers a voice- and touch-enabled shopping experience across mobile, desktop, and Echo Show smart displays. Alexa for Shopping provides more personalized recommendations and automates the shopping experience across Amazon and other online retailers.

zh.title: 亚马逊推出由Alexa+驱动的AI购物助手搜索栏功能
zh.summary: 亚马逊推出了购物助手Alexa，这是一款AI购物助手，可在移动设备、桌面和Echo Show设备上使用，提供个性化推荐并自动化跨亚马逊和其他零售商的购买。Alexa超越亚马逊生态系统的扩展增强了其对消费者的实用性。此举使亚马逊能够在AI驱动的商务市场中占据更大份额。

title: Anduril raises $5B, doubles valuation to $61B
summary: Defense tech startup Anduril has raised $5 billion, doubling its valuation to $61 billion following $2.2 billion in 2025 revenue. The funding round, led by Thrive Capital and a16z, represents one of the largest fundraises in defense technology. The valuation reflects strong investor confidence in autonomous defense systems and military AI applications.
content: After achieving $2.2 billion in revenue in 2025, the defense tech startup has raised another massive round, led by Thrive and a16z, it says.

zh.title: Anduril融资50亿美元，估值翻倍至610亿美元
zh.summary: 防御科技初创公司Anduril融资50亿美元，在2025年营收22亿美元后，估值翻倍至610亿美元。由Thrive Capital和a16z领导的融资轮次代表防御技术领域最大融资之一。该估值反映了投资者对自主防御系统和军事AI应用的强劲信心。

title: r/WallStreetBets really hates the SEC’s proposal to weaken quarterly reporting
summary: The r/WallStreetBets community submitted strong criticism of an SEC proposal to reduce corporate reporting requirements from quarterly to semi-annual filings. Retail traders argue less frequent disclosure would disadvantage individual investors relative to institutional players. The backlash highlights tension between regulatory efficiency goals and market transparency advocates.
content: The retail trading subreddit submitted the sharpest criticism yet of the financial regulator's idea of letting companies report twice per year.

zh.title: r/WallStreetBets社区强烈反对美国证交会削弱季度报告的提议
zh.summary: r/WallStreetBets社区对美国证交会的一项提议提交了强烈批评，该提议旨在将企业报告要求从季度改为半年度报告。散户交易者辩称较少频率的披露会使散户投资者相对于机构投资者处于不利地位。此次反对凸显了监管效率目标与市场透明度倡导者之间的紧张关系。

title: US lawmakers demand answers from Instructure after Canvas data breaches
summary: U.S. House lawmakers are demanding explanations from Instructure following two data breaches affecting Canvas, the company's student data management platform used by educational institutions. The incidents exposed significant amounts of sensitive student data, raising concerns about educational technology security. The congressional pressure reflects growing scrutiny of data protection in edtech.
content: U.S. House lawmakers want to know how hackers broke into education tech giant Instructure twice and stole reams of data from students who use the company's flagship student data software Canvas.

zh.title: 美国议员要求Instructure公司就Canvas数据泄露事件作出解释
zh.summary: 美国众议院议员要求Instructure公司就影响Canvas平台的两次数据泄露事件作出解释。Canvas是该公司为教育机构提供的学生数据管理平台。这些事件暴露了大量敏感的学生数据，引发了人们对教育技术安全的担忧。国会的压力反映了人们对教育技术数据保护的日益关注。

title: Blue Origin may need external funding to hit ambitious launch targets
summary: Blue Origin may need external funding to achieve its ambitious space launch schedule, suggesting Jeff Bezos' personal wealth alone may be insufficient for the company's growth plans. The statement indicates the extreme capital requirements for developing competitive launch capabilities. This reflects the fundamental challenge of scaling commercial spaceflight operations.
content: Are the pockets of Jeff Bezos not as deep as everyone thinks?

zh.title: Blue Origin可能需要外部融资以实现雄心勃勃的发射目标
zh.summary: Blue Origin可能需要外部融资才能实现其雄心勃勃的太空发射计划，这表明杰夫·贝佐斯的个人财富可能不足以支持该公司的增长计划。这一声明表明了开发具有竞争力的发射能力所需的巨大资本需求。这反映了商业太空飞行运营规模化的根本挑战。

title: Anthropic now has more business customers than OpenAI, according to Ramp data
summary: According to expense data from fintech firm Ramp, 34.4% of surveyed businesses use Anthropic's services compared to 32.3% for OpenAI, indicating Anthropic has captured more business customers. The data suggests a notable shift in enterprise adoption preferences away from OpenAI. This metric reflects changing competitive dynamics in the enterprise AI market.
content: A survey compiled from fintech firm Ramp’s clients’ expense data shows 34.4% of participating businesses are paying for Anthropic services, more than any other AI lab, while only 32.3% pay for OpenAI.

zh.title: 根据Ramp数据，Anthropic现在拥有比OpenAI更多的商业客户
zh.summary: 根据金融科技公司Ramp的支出数据，34.4%的受调查企业使用Anthropic的服务，而OpenAI的比例为32.3%，表明Anthropic吸引了更多的商业客户。该数据表明企业采用偏好出现了明显的转变。这一指标反映了企业AI市场中竞争动态的变化。

title: Introducing the 6 stages at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 — built for today’s tougher startup market
summary: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 will run October 13-15 and feature more than 200 sessions across six stages with participation from 250+ technology industry leaders. Early registration is available with discounts up to $410, and group passes offer 50% off additional tickets.
content: From October 13-15, TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 will feature 200+ sessions across six stages, led by 250+ tech leaders shaping the industry today. Register now to save up to $410, plus 50% off a second pass.

zh.title: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026六个舞台介绍——专为当今严峻的初创企业市场而设计
zh.summary: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026将于10月13日至15日举行，在六个舞台上举办200多场会议，250多位科技行业领袖参与。早期注册可享受高达410美元的折扣，团体通票额外门票可享50%折扣。

title: Daredevil: Born Again S2 gives us a darker, grittier canvas
summary: Cinematographer Hillary Fyfe Spera discusses the visual approach for Marvel's Daredevil: Born Again season two, emphasizing how the production maintained visual freshness while delivering a darker, more textured aesthetic. The cinematography supports the show's grittier tone while building on the visual language of previous seasons.
content: Cinematographer Hillary Fyfe Spera on how she kept things visually fresh for Born Again’s second season.

zh.title: 夜魔侠：重生第2季呈现更黑暗、更粗粝的视觉风格
zh.summary: 摄影师Hillary Fyfe Spera讨论了漫威《夜魔侠：重生》第二季的视觉方法，强调制作如何在保持视觉新鲜感的同时呈现更黑暗、更粗粝的美学。摄影支撑了该剧更粗糙的基调，同时继承了前几季的视觉语言。

title: Rivian adds a new onboard AI assistant to its latest software update
summary: Rivian has introduced an onboard AI assistant integrated into its latest software update, available for vehicles with both Gen1 and Gen2 hardware. The assistant brings voice-activated capabilities and contextual understanding to Rivian's infotainment ecosystem, positioning the company to compete with other automakers adding AI-powered features.
content: The Rivian Assistant is available for both Gen1 and Gen2 hardware.

zh.title: Rivian在最新软件更新中添加车载AI助手
zh.summary: Rivian在最新软件更新中推出了车载AI助手，可用于Gen1和Gen2硬件的车辆。该助手为Rivian的信息娱乐生态系统带来了语音激活功能和上下文理解能力，使公司能够与其他推出AI驱动功能的汽车制造商竞争。

title: Adaption aims big with AutoScientist, an AI tool that helps models train themselves
summary: Adaption has released AutoScientist, an AI tool that enables machine learning models to automatically adapt to specific capabilities through accelerated fine-tuning. The platform aims to simplify and speed up model customization for enterprise applications.
content: Adaption's new AutoScientist tool is designed to let models adapt to specific capabilities quickly through an automated approach to conventional fine-tuning.

zh.title: Adaption 推出 AutoScientist，一款帮助模型自我训练的人工智能工具
zh.summary: Adaption 发布了 AutoScientist，这是一款使机器学习模型能够通过加速微调自动适应特定功能的人工智能工具。该平台旨在简化和加速企业应用的模型定制。

title: Unitree will sell you a massive ‘transformable mecha’ for $650,000
summary: Chinese robotics company Unitree has unveiled the GD01, which it claims is the world's first production-ready manned mecha suit, priced at $650,000. The giant robot can transform between bipedal and other configurations and perform heavy-duty tasks like demolishing walls.
content:
Here’s how the GD01 (seen left) stacks up against Unitree’s CEO and existing humanoid robots. | Image: Unitree	

Unitree is already one of the most recognizable names in the humanoid robot industry, but now it's pursuing even nicher sci-fi tech: giant mech suits. The Chinese robotics company has debuted the GD01, which it describes as "the world's first production-ready manned mecha," and it can be yours for a paltry $650,000.
What is it for? Well, Unitree doesn't really explain its intended functionality, but the GD01's introductory video on YouTube provides some ideas. Unitree shows it knocking over a wall of cinderblocks and switching between bipedal position (which, to me, resembles the Power Loader that Ellen Ripley pilots in Aliens) to a mode th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Unitree 将以 65 万美元的价格出售一台巨大的"变形机甲"
zh.summary: 中国机器人公司 Unitree 推出了 GD01，该公司声称这是世界上首个生产就绪的有人驾驶机甲套装，售价 65 万美元。这款巨型机器人可以在双足和其他配置之间转换，并可以执行拆墙等重型任务。

title: Microsoft’s Xbox PC app hints at China expansion for Game Pass
summary: References to "Project Saluki" in Microsoft's Xbox PC app suggest the company is preparing to expand Xbox Game Pass into China for the first time, including subscription services and rewards. This would mark significant entry into one of the world's largest gaming markets.
content:
Microsoft appears to be working on expanding its Xbox Game Pass subscription to China. References to "Project Saluki" have been discovered in a recent update to the Xbox PC app this week, with Microsoft describing the codename as "China market expansion for Game Pass, Rewards, and subscription tiers."
While Microsoft offers a variety of games in China through Activision Blizzard, it does not currently make Xbox Game Pass available in the country. Microsoft does sell Xbox consoles in China, and first launched the Xbox One in China in 2014, becoming the first video game console to do so after a 14-year government ban on game consoles.
The Ch …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软 Xbox PC 应用暗示 Game Pass 将在中国扩展
zh.summary: 微软 Xbox PC 应用中对"Saluki 项目"的引用表明该公司正准备首次将 Xbox Game Pass 扩展到中国，包括订阅服务和奖励计划。这将标志着该公司进入世界上最大的游戏市场之一。

title: The Trump phone starts shipping this week, CEO claims
summary: Trump Mobile CEO Pat O'Brien announced that the Trump phone will begin shipping this week after more than a year of delays since its original announcement. The company plans to fulfill all preorders within the next few weeks.
content:
The Trump phone may finally be here: Trump Mobile's CEO told USA Today that the phone will begin shipping to buyers this week. The announcement comes as reports have gone viral this week alleging that preorders for the phone have been canceled.
Trump Mobile CEO Pat O'Brien confirmed the release plans to USA Today over email, telling the outlet that all preorders will be fulfilled within the next few weeks.
O'Brien reportedly acknowledged the phone's numerous delays - it's now been 11 months since it was announced - though seemingly didn't offer any detailed explanation for why the phone has taken so long to launch. "Those delays were worth …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普手机本周开始发货，CEO声称
zh.summary: Trump Mobile首席执行官帕特·奥布莱恩宣布，特朗普手机将在延迟超过一年后本周开始发货。该公司计划在未来几周内履行所有预订单。

title: The Apple Studio Display could have been so much more
summary: Apple's $1,599 Studio Display dominated the 5K monitor market for over a decade due to limited competition, but its aging display technology now faces challenges as BenQ and Asus released comparable alternatives in late 2024. The article examines how Apple's technical advantages are eroding.
content:
The Studio Display looks great next to a MacBook, but its aging display technology holds it back. | Photo by John Higgins / The Verge	

For the better part of 12 years, Apple owned the 5K monitor world - primarily because it made basically the only options. LG's 5K UltraFine was a solid, if bland choice, but many people bought a 27-inch iMac from 2014 for its 5K screen alone. Then in 2022, Apple finally gave the people what they wanted by releasing the $1,599 Studio Display (which was essentially the iMac's screen as a separate monitor with a webcam and speakers) and removed the LG from its store.
It wasn't until late 2024 that companies like BenQ and Asus finally began releasing their own 27-inch 5K monitors. And while the Studio Display was the best built and best looking …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果Studio Display本可以更出色
zh.summary: 苹果公司1,599美元的Studio Display因竞争有限而主导5K显示器市场超过十年，但其老化的显示技术现在面临挑战，因为宏碁和华硕在2024年晚期发布了可比较的替代品。这篇文章研究了苹果的技术优势是如何消退的。

title: Could this be the moment that drug manufacturing takes off in orbit?
summary: The space industry is entering a potentially pivotal moment for orbital pharmaceutical manufacturing, which could become a viable production method beyond Earth-based facilities. This represents a new frontier for drug manufacturing and industrial space applications.
content: "I do think it's a really good historical moment for the space industry."

zh.title: 药物制造在轨道上起飞的时刻到来了吗？
zh.summary: 太空工业正进入轨道制药制造的潜在关键时刻，这可能成为超越地球设施的可行生产方法。这代表了药物制造和工业空间应用的新前沿。

title: Data centers are coming for rural America
summary: A converted paper mill in rural Maine is becoming a data center as companies increasingly expand infrastructure into economically challenged regions. The 1.4 million-square-foot facility represents a shift from traditional manufacturing to tech infrastructure investment in rural America.
content:
At its peak, the Androscoggin paper mill in Jay, Maine, a rural town about 67 miles northwest of Portland, employed about 1,500 people - until a pulp digester exploded in 2020, forcing the mill to close permanently. 
In 2023, the 1.4 million-square-foot facility was purchased through a joint venture by JGT2 Redevelopment and a number of other holding and capital companies. The project is led by developer Tony McDonald. Over the next three years, McDonald and his team broke down the mill's machinery and shipped it to Pakistan, and worked to clean up the industrial site for resale. That resale agreement was finalized earlier this year, accord …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 数据中心涌入美国农村
zh.summary: 一个位于缅因州农村的改建造纸厂正在成为数据中心，随着公司不断向经济困难地区扩展基础设施。这个140万平方英尺的设施代表了从传统制造业向农村美国科技基础设施投资的转变。

title: Amazon’s Panos Panay addresses new Fire phone rumors
summary: Amazon executive Panos Panay declined to directly deny rumors that the company is developing an AI-powered smartphone codenamed "Transformer," more than a decade after the failed Fire Phone. The company has not ruled out re-entering the smartphone market.
content:
Amazon's head of devices and services, Panos Panay, says that the company is "not necessarily" planning to release a smartphone, but has stopped short of denying it outright. It was previously reported that Amazon is developing an Alexa-enabled AI phone codenamed "Transformer," more than 10 years after it scrapped its ill-fated Fire Phone.
Speaking to the Financial Times, Panay was asked directly if the company was planning another smartphone. "It's just not the goal," he replied. "I know there's a lot of rumors out there."
"I think your black and white question is, are you going after a phone? A lot of people want me to say no, but a lot  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊帕诺斯·帕奈回应新Fire手机传言
zh.summary: 亚马逊高管帕诺斯·帕奈拒绝直接否认该公司正在开发代号为"变形金刚"的人工智能手机的传言，这是在失败的Fire手机推出十多年后。该公司还没有排除重新进入智能手机市场的可能性。

title: Sony’s new Xperia phone gets an overdue redesign
summary: Sony's Xperia 1 VIII marks the first major redesign of the flagship line since 2020, moving to a distinctive square camera island layout. The phone features an improved telephoto camera and an AI-powered camera assistant similar to Google's Camera Coach. This redesign signals Sony's effort to refresh a device line that had grown stale in the competitive smartphone market.
content:
Sony’s new flagship doesn’t look much like its predecessors. | Image: Sony / The Verge	

Sony's Xperia 1 flagships have looked more or less the same since 2020, but that's finally changing with the Xperia 1 VIII, which moves to a chunky square camera island. The phone also boasts what should be a substantially improved telephoto camera, along with an AI camera assistant that looks like an improved version of Google's Camera Coach.
While every previous Xperia 1 phone has had three vertical cameras, and the last six have positioned them in the same top-left corner spot, the 1 VIII mixes things up. The three lenses are now laid out in a square block, together with the flash and a Sony logo, that's raised from the phone but slopes  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼新款Xperia手机迎来期待已久的重新设计
zh.summary: 索尼Xperia 1 VIII标志着自2020年以来该旗舰系列的首次重大改版，采用了独特的方形摄像头岛布局。该手机配备了改进的长焦摄像头和类似Google Camera Coach的AI驱动摄像头助手。这次重新设计表明索尼正在努力刷新这一在竞争激烈的智能手机市场中逐渐陈旧的产品线。

title: Medicare’s new payment model is built for AI, and most of the tech world has no idea
summary: Medicare has created a new payment mechanism called ACCESS that reimburses AI agents for monitoring patients between visits, coordinating care, and managing medications—filling a previously non-existent coverage gap for AI-driven healthcare services.
content: There is no governmental mechanism to pay for an AI agent that monitors a patient between visits, calls to check in, coordinates a housing referral, or makes sure someone picks up their medication. ACCESS creates that mechanism for the first time.

zh.title: 医疗保险新支付模式是为人工智能而建的，但科技界大多数人都不知道
zh.summary: 医疗保险创建了一个称为ACCESS的新支付机制，该机制为人工智能代理在患者访问之间进行患者监控、协调护理和管理药物进行报销——填补了人工智能驱动的医疗保健服务之前不存在的覆盖空白。
